description: Minimal working example of a NeuroGrim Brain. Intended for newcomers to see the Brain produce a real score on a real (if tiny) codebase, without needing to configure anything themselves. See examples/hello-brain/README.md for the walkthrough.

git-health.description: VCS state: branch divergence, uncommitted changes, commit cadence.

test-health.description: Test framework presence + test-directory layout + recent-results availability.

code-quality.description: README presence + lint-config presence + documentation hygiene.
